summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SmokePing network monitoring system. All backend APIs working correctly (19/19 tests passed), frontend fully functional with all major flows tested successfully including authentication, agent management, target management, alerts, settings, and public status page.

design_issues.issue: Initial WebSocket connection failures before successful reconnection
design_issues.note: This is normal behavior for WebSocket connections and self-corrects

passed_tests: Backend API - All 19 endpoints (100% success rate)
Mobile responsive design and mobile menu
